hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then /Users/murashigekeisuke/.nvm/versions/node/v22.18.0/bin/npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -40; /Users/murashigekeisuke/.nvm/versions/node/v22.18.0/bin/npm run lint 2>&1 | head -40; fi
